ddt:Target.Name: GEP_X92-X52-X67_SW_51-40-60
ddt:Target.Description:
GEP Direction Assistée pour SW 51-40-60 Projet: J92-FK67-X52 base DDT Mars 2011
Spec DiagOnCAN : 65620/2009/128 V1 36-00-013--A
Mohamed maaddem - SERMA - tel : +33 176853911 - DIESE - sce 65620

Data.Name: Derating Level
Data.Comment: Lecture du pourcentage de la limitation d'assistance , fonction de la température système; $21$01

Data.Name: ECU Temperature
Data.Comment: Valeur de température Drive Stage (MOSFETs); $21$01; system frame

Item.Text: $C100 - CAN Lost Communication with Engine Control Module
$C129 - CAN Lost Communication with Brake Control Module
$C140 - CAN Lost Communication with Body Control Module
$C418 - CAN Invalid Data Received from Brake Control Modul
$C422 - CAN Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module
D22B - CAN Steering Wheel Speed fault

Data.Name: Motor Temperature
Data.Comment: Lecture de la température système estimée par le Thermal Estimator; $21$01; system frame

Data.Name: Traceability Information
Data.Comment: Lecture des données de fabrication du système $21$84

Data.Name: Oil Temperature
Data.Comment: Estimation de la température hydraulique à partir du modèle + mesure température ECU; $21$01

Data.Name: Motor Current
Data.Comment: Courant consommé par le moteur; en A; $21$01

Data.Name: Motor Speed
Data.Comment: Vitesse moteur; en rpm; $21$01; freeze frame

Data.Name: Average Current
Data.Comment: Courant moyen consommé par le GEP (Courant Batterie); $21$01; freeze frame

Data.Name: Consigned Motor Speed
Data.Comment: Consigned Motor Speed; rpm; $21$01; freeze frame

Data.Name: Compteur APC
Data.Comment: nb de +APC après disparition du DTC (data Freeze Frame)

Data.Name: Tuning Data CRC
Data.Description:
VehicleSpeed1 VehicleSpeed2 VehicleSpeed3 VehicleSpeed4 VehicleSpeed5 VehicleSpeed6 VehicleSpeed7 VehicleSpeed8 VehicleSpeed9 VehicleSpeed10

VitesseVolant1 VitesseVolant2 VitesseVolant3 VitesseVolant4 VitesseVolant5 VitesseVolant6 VitesseVolant7 VitesseVolant8 VitesseVolant9 VitesseVolant10

RégimeDePompe11

RégimeDePompe12

RégimeDePompe13

RégimeDePompe14

RégimeDePompe15

RégimeDePompe16

RégimeDePompe19

RégimeDePompe27

RégimeDePompe28

RégimeDePompe29

RégimeDePompe210

Data.Name: Vehicle Speed_filtered
Data.Comment: valeur du CAN filtrée par le GEP; $21$01

Data.Name: Tension batterie_DTC
Data.Comment: tension qd DTC apparait (data Freeze Frame)

Data.Name: Motor Current_DTC
Data.Comment: Courant qd le DTC apparait (data Freeze Frame)

Data.Name: ECU Temperature_DTC
Data.Comment: Valeur de température Drive Stage (MOSFETs); DTC

Data.Name: Motor Temperature_DTC
Data.Comment: Lecture de la température système estimée par le Thermal Estimator; freezeframe

Data.Name: Nb apparition defaut
Data.Comment: nb de fois où le défaut est apparu (freeze frame)

Data.Name: Voltage Boost Activation
Data.Comment: $2111 response for the status of vaoltage boost activation

Data.Name: Tuning Slot Selection
Data.Comment: Tuning Slot Selection for operational mode

Data.Name: SteeringWheelSpeed_DTC
Data.Comment: Steering Wheel speed for freeze frame

Data.Name: SteeringWheelAngle_DTC
Data.Comment: Steering wheel angle for freeze frame

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Assembled HEPS part number "basic part" ASCII
Assembled HEPS part number "lower part" ASCII

Request.Name: RDBLI _ System Identification RENAULT
Request.Comment: Read System Identifiaction for Renault EPS

Request.Name: WDBLI _ Date of AfterSales
Request.Comment: Writing of the last date of aftersales

DataItem.Name: Assembled HEPS part number "basic part" ASCII
Assembled HEPS part number "lower part" ASCII

Device.Name: $C100 - CAN Lost Communication with Engine Control Module
$C129 - CAN Lost Communication with Brake Control Module
$C140 - CAN Lost Communication with Body Control Module
$C418 - CAN Invalid Data Received from Brake Control Modul
$C422 - CAN Invalid Data Received from Body Control Module
D22B - CAN Steering Wheel Speed fault

Display.DataName: Assembled HEPS part number "basic part" ASCII
Assembled HEPS part number "lower part" ASCII

Label.Text: Condition 1 : IGNITION has been seen "ON" for more than 1s (power-up sequence completed),
